title: Soul Scythe
description: This datapack adds new weapon, that can contains souls of mobs
body: This Datapack adds a new weapon - the soul scythe. The soul scythe can store 5 types of souls, each with a maximum of 10 pieces. The zombie's soul heals. The soul of the skeleton is... useless. The soul of the creeper just blows everyone up. The soul of enderman teleports you for a million blocks. Blaze soul throws fireballs. In order to use the soul, you to right-click with the selected soul in the scythe. To switch souls, you need to click on the shift.
